calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-342 ecological maintenance-time commitment-release EVIDENCE (real REEAgent + real CausalGridWorldV2; natural commit + natural mid-commitment readiness degradation via SD-047; use_maintenance_release ON-vs-OFF release axis)
items.note: ECOLOGICAL evidence-grade complement to the diagnostic state-machine probe V3-EXQ-592g (PASS). PREDECESSOR reference, NOT supersedes -- 592g is a valid diagnostic (stubs E3.select, forces committed state); 629 uses a REAL REEAgent in a REAL CausalGridWorldV2 where commitment is NATURAL (E3.select not stubbed, R-c-gated entry) and readiness degrades NATURALLY mid-commitment (SD-047 multi_source_dynamics raises E2 world-forward error -> running_variance -> nav proxy drop + score-margin compression). Arm axis = use_maintenance_release ON vs OFF (commit-entry gating identical). Two P2 windows: HEALTHY (no false abort) + DEGRADED (decommit + mech342 fires + occupancy < OFF, which reproduces the 592f gap). Distinct-from controls config-enforced: use_harm_stream=False (MECH-091 inert), V_s commit-release OFF, ghost-goal OFF. C2 INVALID_HARNESS guard -> non_contributory (not FAIL) if SD-047 degradation insufficient. Required by the 2026-06-02 /governance disposition (MECH-342 stays candidate/v3_pending until an ecological evidence-grade run lands). experiment_purpose=evidence; claim_ids=[MECH-342]. Bumped from 628 (concurrent MECH-319 session b7fae0a took 628).

items.title: MECH-314 structured-curiosity validation on SD-056-trained substrate (5-arm: curiosity OFF / ALL_ON / 314a-off / 314b-off / 314c-off; supersedes 604)
items.note: Evidence-purpose MECH-314 validation. Supersedes V3-EXQ-604 (FAIL non_contributory/substrate_ceiling 2026-05-21: all arms identical, monomodal collapse; governance directed 'retest after structured-curiosity substrate carries in'). 604 ran the agent forward with NO E2 training, so candidate z_world was action-degenerate and the per-candidate novelty bonus (314a) had no signal. ROOT-CAUSE FIX: the substrate that 'carries it in' is SD-056 (e2.action_conditional_divergence_contrastive, landed 2026-05-31). This run trains E2 online with the SD-056 InfoNCE contrastive loss (weight 0.05; harness verbatim from the landed V3-EXQ-569d) so candidates are action-divergent, THEN ablates structured curiosity across 5 arms. ACCEPTANCE: C0 substrate-readiness GUARD (cand_world_pairwise_dist>0.03 in >=2/3 seeds in EVERY arm -- confirms SD-056 fixed the collapse; if C0 fails the run is non_contributory -> /diagnose-errors, NOT a MECH-314 falsification); C1 MECH-314 parent effect (ARM_ALL_ON selected_action_class_entropy differs from ARM_OFF by >0.03); C2 sub-flavour discriminability (informative -- which of 314a/b/c are selection-level load-bearing; 314a/novelty expected per the Phase-1 honest-scoping caveat that 314b/c are broadcast scalars). PASS=C0 AND C1 -> evidence supports MECH-314 parent; evidence_direction_per_claim splits Q-044/MECH-314/314a/b/c. EXPERIMENT_PURPOSE=evidence; claim_ids=[Q-044,MECH-314,MECH-314a,MECH-314b,MECH-314c]. Dry-run smoke PASS at harness level 2026-06-02: all 5 arms run end-to-end (5 verdicts, no crash), instrumentation correct (ep N/80 denominator = P0 60 + P1 20; Seed/Condition boundaries; emit_outcome wired); C0 budget-limited at dry scale (P0=2 can't train E2 -- expected, clears at full P0=60 per 569d's ~0.045 pairwise dist). validate_experiments OK. any-affinity for cloud-fleet utilization; ~480min est on CX22 (5x3x80ep + online E2 training).

items.title: ARC-029/MECH-090 across-tick nav_competence ECOLOGICAL: suppress-on-degrade / admit-on-recover (3-arm OFF/NAV_COMP_ON/BOTH_ON; successor to V3-EXQ-063a)
items.note: Completes the ACROSS-TICK nav_competence axis that V3-EXQ-063a deliberately left OFF. The MECH-090 R-c continuation (2026-05-29) wired the nav_competence CONSUMER + notify_outcome seam but no caller ever pushed an outcome (grep-verified zero notify_outcome callers), so in any ecological run the readiness EMA sat fail-open at 1.0 and the across-tick axis added no signal -- exactly why 063a left it OFF. The Phase-2 env-source follow-on landed THIS session (ree-v3 fa026a0): CausalGridWorldV2.mech090_readiness_outcome_enabled emits info[mech090_readiness_outcome]=clip(1-mean(limb_damage),0,1) and REEAgent.sense(mech090_readiness_outcome=...) advances commit_readiness.update(). This is the FIRST ecological run that exercises the across-tick axis. DESIGN: train one vanilla agent/seed (committed-capable) on a standard limb-damage env; eval 3 arms (fresh agent per arm, SHARED trained weights via state_dict so the comparison isolates the eval-time gate) on a degrade/recover env (SD-022 scheduled all-limb injection interval=60 magnitude=0.8 + healing -> readiness oscillates above/below floor 0.3). ARM_0 OFF baseline (readiness NOT forwarded) / ARM_2 GATED_NAV_COMP_ON (nav axis alone, env outcome forwarded) / ARM_3 GATED_BOTH_ON (both R-c gates). Mirrors the design-doc 592b ARM_2/ARM_3 arms, ecologically. 'committed step' = beta_gate.is_elevated; bucketed by readiness (READY>=floor vs DEGRADED<floor). ACCEPTANCE (C1-C4 required; C5 informative): C1 gate fires (>=1 nav block); C2 suppress-on-degrade (ARM_2 committed_rate_ready - committed_rate_degraded >= 0.15); C3 admit-on-recover (ARM_2 committed_rate_ready >= 0.10 -- gate does NOT permanently lock out commitment); C4 OFF-baseline null (ARM_0 |delta| < 0.15 -- rules out a damage->commitment confound, isolates the GATE); C5 composed at least as strict (ARM_3 degraded <= ARM_2 degraded + 0.05). claim_ids=[ARC-029,MECH-090] (re-evaluated from scratch, NOT inherited from 063a's single ARC-029 tag -- this run directly exercises+measures the MECH-090 R-c across-tick gate; evidence_direction_per_claim splits them). EXPERIMENT_PURPOSE=evidence. INTERPRETATION/ROUTING (epoch_stale_evidence_review_2026-06-02.md REVALIDATION STATUS): a C3 FAIL (gate suppresses commitment even when readiness recovers) = the R-c gate suppresses commitment in this env = a substantively different ARC-029 verdict than 063's ungated PASS -> route /failure-autopsy NOT /diagnose-errors, and do NOT silently re-tune commit_readiness_floor (substrate decision). C1 FAIL or C4 FAIL -> /diagnose-errors. Does NOT supersede 063a (063a is the within-tick-axis ecological evidence; 630 is the across-tick complement). Dry-run smoke PASS at harness level 2026-06-02: 3 arms run end-to-end (per-seed verdict, no crash), instrumentation correct (ep N/M M=warmup=300 denominator, Seed/Condition boundary, emit_outcome wired), arms differ correctly (ARM_2/3 readiness EMA advances from the forwarded env signal, ARM_3 within-tick gate fired n_elev_blocked=3, ARM_0 readiness stays 1.0); C1/degraded-window budget-limited at dry scale (30 steps < injection interval 60 -- clears at full 200 steps/ep with injections at 60/120/180). validate_experiments OK. ID-collision note: originally drafted as V3-EXQ-628 but a concurrent session committed 628 (MECH-319) + 629 (MECH-342) to origin between draft and queue; renamed to 630 (next free).

items.title: Q-045/MECH-313/MECH-260 + FP-2 dissociation on scaffolded_sd054_onboarding (re-issue of 603d on hook-fixed scheduler + z_goal_enabled config)
items.note: Substrate-readiness validation (EXPERIMENT_PURPOSE=diagnostic) of the 2026-06-02 implement-substrate AMEND (scaffolded_sd054_onboarding update_z_goal wiring, ree-v3 deb24cc). THREE changes vs 603d: (1) restored P0/P1=100/50 budget; (2) from_dims sets z_goal_enabled=True + drive_weight=2.0 (603d omitted it -> goal_state None -> update_z_goal early-returned); (3) bespoke P2 loop now calls update_z_goal each step. Acceptance: z_goal_norm_peak > 0.4 on >=2/3 seeds in P2 AND P1 survival gate passed on >=2/3 seeds. Forced-seed verification confirmed the 603e P2 path forms z_goal (peak 0.36 at 25 steps). claim_ids recorded as context (diagnostic; not governance-weighted).

items.title: MECH-341 within-class temperature 4-arm sweep -- corrected harness (committed-class metric + within-class diagnostics + cross-seed-mean C1; supersedes 614c)
items.note: CORRECTED-HARNESS re-run of the MECH-341 stratified_within_class_temperature validation. Supersedes V3-EXQ-614c, which RAN (12/12 cells, no crash) but was reclassified non_contributory for MECH-341 due to TWO test-harness defects (NOT substrate falsification; see failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-614c_2026-06-01 + outstanding_tasks_triage_2026-06-02 item 3). Substrate config is BIT-IDENTICAL to 614c (SD-056-amended 4-substrate baseline: SP-CEM + MECH-341 entropy_bias_scale=2.0 + MECH-313 + V_s minimal + 5 SD-056 levers); the ONLY change is the measurement harness. Defect-1 fix (C2 was vacuous): 614c measured selected_class_entropy at the score-layer argmin(last_scores), temperature-INVARIANT to the within-class lever (the lever only changes the committed within-class representative inside stratified_select, when a class holds >=2 candidates) -> ARM_1/2/3 were bit-identical. 614d's C2 reads the COMMITTED-action class distribution (committed_class_entropy_nats) via a per-seed PAIRED lift over ARM_0_LEGACY (margin 0.05 nats, >=2/3 seeds), and records the lever's firing diagnostics per seed (mech341_n_within_class_sampled / mech341_n_stratified_fired / mech341_last_within_class_temperature) from agent.score_diversity.get_state() so a null result is readable as 'branch starved by env' vs 'branch active but no lift'. Defect-2 fix (C1 mis-specified): 614c required >=2/3 ARM_0 per-seed entropies IN the [0.720,0.880] band; ARM_0 cross-seed mean was 0.7999 (no regression) but 0/3 landed in band. 614d's C1 compares the ARM_0_LEGACY CROSS-SEED MEAN of selected_class_entropy (the 614b-equivalent metric) against the band. Acceptance: C1 ARM_LEGACY reproduces 614b ALL_ON 0.800 +/-10% (regression guard, cross-seed mean); C2 >=1 of {0.5,1.0,2.0} lifts committed-class entropy on majority of seeds; C3 frac_pre_ge2>0.3 on all 4 arms / majority seeds. PASS=C1 AND (C2 OR C3); 5-row interpretation grid (incl. branch-active vs branch-starved split on the C1+C3-only cell). 4 arms x 3 seeds (42/43/44) x 90 ep (P0 30 / P1 60) x 200 steps. EXPERIMENT_PURPOSE=diagnostic (excluded from confidence/conflict scoring); claim_ids=[MECH-341] recorded as context. Gates MECH-341 v3_pending clearance, the Q-054 re-issue (V3-EXQ-616a), and arc_062_rule_apprehension:GAP-B (V3-EXQ-543l cohort) at the governance-decision level. use_differentiable_cem NOT flipped (default False; SD-055 safety note preserved). Mac-pinned (DLAPTOP-4.local) for direct numerical comparability with the 614b/614c reference manifests (C1 regression guard). validate_experiments AST OK; dry-run smoke PASS (4 arms run, progress instrumentation correct M=90/verdict/boundary, emit_outcome sentinel wired); within-class plumbing verified (positive-temp arm shows n_within_class_sampled=10, committed_class_entropy populated). Phase3-queue snapshot race hazard mitigation per REE_Working/CLAUDE.md (post-commit dropped-file check).
